visual_description: An older man in a dark suit and patterned bow tie stands against a green wall, his head tilted slightly downward. The scene cuts to a younger man in a white shirt and tie, wearing glasses, who looks straight ahead with his eyes briefly closed. A hand reaches into a black container, grasping a silver metal tool while a striped tube rests nearby, then the view shifts to a blurry figure seen through a glass pane beside a white door.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
